name: rung_270_story_lineage_fragmented_ingest
utterances: Harbor notebook header: use exact predicates and exact argument order.
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- at(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).

Fragment from the harbor opening: assert fact parent(sera, imren). assert fact parent(sera, nessa). assert fact parent(imren, tal). assert fact at(tal, salt_house). assert fact inside(salt_house, glass_harbor).
